  • Brain Food
  • About Me

"When something is important enough, you do it even if the odds are not in your favor"

I am an AI Engineer with a passion for leveraging Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Large Language Models (LLMs) to create impactful solutions, particularly in areas such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and AI agents. I hold a Master’s degree in Physics from IIT Ropar and a Bachelor’s degree in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics from Kumaun University. Currently, I am contributing to innovative NLP projects at a stealth startup, focusing on document analysis and processing, as well as building intelligent AI agents. Additionally, I lead the Omdena Dehradun chapter, where I collaborate with others to develop AI solutions for social impact, bringing people together to create innovative solutions for the greater good using AI.

Beyond my professional work, I enjoy exploring the philosophical implications of AI, discussing books and music, and engaging in sports like cricket and volleyball. I also share my work and insights through presentations (slides available here.). I'm always open to connecting with fellow AI enthusiasts and researchers to discuss new ideas and potential collaborations. Feel free to reach out!
